list.title: Deliveries
list.subtitle: Review and approve delivery reports raised against your purchase orders
list.emptyHint: Delivery reports submitted against your purchase orders will appear here.
list.loadFailed: Failed to load delivery reports. Please try again.

create.title: Create Delivery report
create.subtitle: Record what was received against the purchase order
create.attachmentHint: Supported formats: PDF, XLSX, DOCX, JPG, CSV. Max size: 10 MB
create.noPoHint: Choose the purchase order this delivery is for.
create.loadFailed: Failed to load the purchase order. Please try again.
create.validation: Each received quantity must be a whole number of 0 or more.
create.submitFailed: Could not submit the delivery report. Please try again.

detail.title: Delivery report
detail.subtitle: Review the submitted delivery against the purchase order

review.approveFailed: Could not approve the delivery report. Please try again.
review.rejectDescription: Rejection reason will be stored. The PO status will not be affected.
review.rejectFailed: Could not reject the delivery report. Please try again.

qr.title: QR code
qr.helper: Share this code with the delivery person. Scanning it opens a form to submit a delivery report for this purchase order — no login required.
qr.generateFailed: Could not generate the delivery link. Please try again.

portal.loadFailed: We couldn't load this delivery. Please try again.
portal.expiredToken: This delivery link has expired or is no longer valid.
portal.expiredTokenHint: Ask the buyer to share a new delivery QR code or link.
portal.invalidTokenHint: Check the link you scanned and try again.

identify.title: Identify yourself
identify.subtitle: Enter your name and email to receive a one-time access code.
identify.helper: A 6-digit OTP will be sent to your email. Valid for 15 minutes.
identify.sendFailed: Couldn't send the access code. Please try again.

code.title: Enter access code
code.subtitle: Sent to {{email}}. Enter the 6-digit code below.
code.expired: Your access code has expired. Change your email to request a new one.
code.invalid: That code is incorrect. Please check your email and try again.
code.locked: Too many attempts. Please request a new code.
code.verifyFailed: Couldn't verify the code. Please try again.

report.title: Delivery Report
report.notesPlaceholder: Add overall notes about this delivery…
report.submitFailed: Couldn't submit your delivery report. Please try again.

submitted.title: Report submitted
submitted.subtitle: Your delivery report for {{poNumber}} has been received.
